detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TSUKATWO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TSUKATWO.sol#671-795):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TSUKATWO.sol#735)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TSUKATWO.sol#809-821)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TSUKATWO.sol#741)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TSUKATWO.sol#829)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TSUKATWO.sol#793)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TSUKATWO.sol#955)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TSUKATWO.sol#935)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TSUKATWO.sol#937)
	TSUKATWO._rOwned (TSUKATWO.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TSUKATWO._takeTeam(uint256) (TSUKATWO.sol#949-957)
	- TSUKATWO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TSUKATWO.sol#909-945)
	- TSUKATWO.balanceOf(address) (TSUKATWO.sol#497-501)
	- TSUKATWO.constructor() (TSUKATWO.sol#431-461)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TSUKATWO.sol#793)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TSUKATWO.sol#963)
	TSUKATWO._rTotal (TSUKATWO.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TSUKATWO._getCurrentSupply() (TSUKATWO.sol#1105-1115)
	- TSUKATWO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TSUKATWO.sol#961-967)
	- TSUKATWO.constructor() (TSUKATWO.sol#431-461)
	- TSUKATWO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TSUKATWO.sol#593-615)
